description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a casual summer appearance, featuring a sleeveless fitted top and knee-length denim shorts. She stands upright with arms slightly outstretched, suggesting a neutral or T-pose stance. Her footwear consists of open-toed sandals with ankle straps, suitable for warm weather and urban walking. The figure's hair is styled in a medium-length ponytail, keeping it off her face and neck. The body proportions and visible musculature are realistic, with natural limb articulation and defined joints. No accessories or carried objects are present, and the overall look is relaxed and informal, appropriate for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult woman stands upright in a sleeveless top, denim shorts, and sandals, with her hair in a ponytail. She has a relaxed, neutral pose and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, shorts, and sandals, with arms outstretched and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, profile of the face, and the side contour of the clothing and sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the top, shorts, and sandals, as well as the ponytail and shoulder blades.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ponytail, and side details of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless top and knee-length denim shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
